ops.body: Criterion closed 2026-07-17 with evidence: (1) suite green — full unpiped `uv run pytest` run, exit 0, all dots to 100%, warnings-only; (2) record-replay parity — covered inside that green suite (tests/integration/test_replay_copy.py, tests/unit/test_replay_source.py, plus test_ocr_engine_parity.py / test_fold_parity.py); (3) fidelity bake-off — WAIVED by user-directed decision, note f946551: the FidelityGate is cerebras-relative and cannot discriminate a local engine swap (the llama.cpp incumbent fails the same gate), so "bake-off passes" is a category error for this migration. D2+D3 incl. the rapid-mlx swap are landed on stream-trade main. Also reconciled: orphaned local `bakeoff` bookmark deleted (recovery note f317f8b in stream-trade's ledger).
